_comment: Complete Neighborhood overrides for all 35 cities. Not niche-specific. One pricing object per neighborhood.

lekki.price_context: Lekki businesses expect premium digital positioning and fast load times, catering to a tech-forward and affluent demographic.
lekki.competitive_landscape: The Lekki market is highly saturated; businesses compare 4-5 agencies before deciding. A slow or outdated website loses clients instantly.
lekki.local_insight: Emerging startups and real estate firms along the Lekki-Epe corridor are digitally active but require modern, conversion-optimized platforms.
lekki.neighborhood_uniqueness: Lekki acts as the modern luxury and tech-startup capital of West Africa, creating a fast-paced, highly aesthetic-driven business environment.

ikeja.price_context: Ikeja businesses are practical and ROI-focused, requiring professional but budget-friendly web solutions.
ikeja.competitive_landscape: Competition in Ikeja relies heavily on local SEO. Brands bidding for state government contracts need credibility-first websites.
ikeja.local_insight: Businesses around Allen Avenue and the capital hub see high search volume on mobile devices and prioritize local map rankings.
ikeja.neighborhood_uniqueness: As the state capital and central mainland hub, Ikeja blends heavy administrative presence with a dense, pragmatic commercial ecosystem.

victoria-island.neighborhood_uniqueness: Victoria Island is Nigeria's undisputed financial and corporate headquarters, defined by high-rise offices, diplomatic missions, and enterprise transactions.

ikoyi.neighborhood_uniqueness: Ikoyi is the pinnacle of generational wealth and exclusivity in Nigeria, demanding the highest level of discretion and premium branding.

yaba.neighborhood_uniqueness: Often dubbed the 'Yabacon Valley,' this neighborhood is the gritty, innovative birthplace of Nigeria's tech and developer ecosystem.
